response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior/staff-level full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and some recent exposure to AI-agent tooling (MCP) at Naver, but the role calls for a Director-level individual contributor with recognized AI expertise, cloud platform strategy depth, and a track record of advising strategic customers on cutting-edge AI adoption. The resume shows neither principal/staff-level strategic influence at scale, nor demonstrated AI products/platforms, nor deep cloud architecture leadership.
strengths: ~15 years of polyglot engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at Naver
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, open-source contributions, public speaking)
concerns: No evidence of Director-level IC scope, AI strategy advisory, or external thought leadership in AI
Cloud experience is limited (AWS CDK usage) — lacks recognized cloud platform expertise expected at principal level
No demonstrated AI products/platforms shipped, no advanced AI-related degree, and no clear entrepreneurial-within-large-org track record

key_factors.factor: Lacks principal/AI-strategy seniority and recognized AI expertise
Limited cloud platform and architectural strategy depth
Recent MCP/agent-tooling exposure and broad engineering tenure
